channel.title: Sound baths in Fort Collins · Sound Bath Calendar
channel.description: A weekly-updated calendar of sound baths in Fort Collins, Colorado: dates, times, venues, prices, and ticket links for every listed session. Part of the Front Range sound bath calendar.

item.title: Nourish: Women's Circle & Sound Bath
item.description: A women's circle and sound bath hosted by The Living Room in Fort Collins, Wednesday evening. Where: The Living Room, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/nourish-womens-circle-sound-bath-2026-07-22-the-living-room/

item.title: Thursday Mind Body Reset — Gong Journey
item.description: Weekly Thursday evening gong bath using multiple large gongs, followed by tea and community time; held at the studio near Horsetooth Reservoir. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch LLC, Fort Collins. Price: From $44.52. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/thursday-mind-body-reset-gong-journey-2026-07-23-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch-llc/

item.title: Thursday's Weekly Gong Journey
item.description: A weekly Thursday gong journey at Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch in Fort Collins, Thursday evening; $40. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/thursdays-weekly-gong-journey-2026-07-23-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: Friday Recharge: A Restorative Sound Journey
item.description: A restorative sound journey with Annmarie of ResoundingWell at Wildfire Arts Center in Fort Collins, Friday evening. Where: Wildfire Arts Center, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/friday-recharge-a-restorative-sound-journey-2026-07-24-wildfire-arts-center/

item.title: Good Morning Outdoor Sound Journey
item.description: Morning outdoor sound journey held at Old Canal Park; donation-based. Where: Old Canal Park, Fort Collins. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/good-morning-outdoor-sound-journey-2026-07-27-old-canal-park/

item.title: Outdoor Full Moon Gong Journey
item.description: An outdoor full-moon gong journey by Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch in Fort Collins, Wednesday evening; $42–47. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $42–47. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/outdoor-full-moon-gong-journey-2026-07-29-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: Relaxing Soundbath at the Seedlings Dome
item.description: A sound bath led by Zach Miller at the Seedlings Dome on Hartman Street in Fort Collins, Thursday evening. Where: The Seedlings Dome at Hartman Street, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/relaxing-soundbath-at-the-seedlings-dome-2026-07-30-the-seedlings-dome-at-hartman-street/

item.title: Sacred Roots Gathering Sound Bath
item.description: A sound bath led by Norabell Dechant at Verdant Nature Creations in Fort Collins, Saturday afternoon. Where: Verdant Nature Creations, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sacred-roots-gathering-sound-bath-2026-08-01-verdant-nature-creations/

item.title: Sundays of Sound - Mind Body Reset Gong Journey
item.description: Sunday morning gong journey using multiple large gongs for deep relaxation, held at the Fort Collins studio. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch LLC, Fort Collins. Price: From $44.52. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sundays-of-sound-mind-body-reset-gong-journey-2026-08-02-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch-llc/

item.title: Sunday Morning of Sound Gong Journey - Horsetooth Reservoir
item.description: A morning gong journey at Horsetooth Reservoir near Fort Collins, hosted by Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Sunday morning; $41–46. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $41–46. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sunday-morning-of-sound-gong-journey-horsetooth-reservoir-2026-08-02-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: Harvesting Intentions: A Sound Journey into Gratitude
item.description: A sound journey with Annmarie of ResoundingWell at Live Beyond Limit in Fort Collins, Sunday evening. Where: Live Beyond Limit, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/harvesting-intentions-a-sound-journey-into-gratitude-2026-08-02-live-beyond-limit/

item.title: Sound Bath: A Sacred Start to the School Year
item.description: A back-to-school sound bath led by Lauren Salz at the Timnath Community Room near Fort Collins, Saturday morning. Where: Timnath Community Room, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-bath-a-sacred-start-to-the-school-year-2026-08-08-timnath-community-room/

item.title: Second Saturday Sound Bath, Meditation & Community Circle
item.description: A Second Saturday sound bath, meditation, and community circle by Citrine Unlimited at Brookstone Recreation Center near Fort Collins, Saturday afternoon. Where: Brookstone Recreation Center, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/second-saturday-sound-bath-meditation-community-circle-2026-08-08-brookstone-recreation-center/
